title: Multimodal Tokenization
learning_outcomes: Formulate CLIP text-image contrastive embedding alignments.
Explain visual token projection layer mappings.

content_sections.title: Multimodal Alignment and CLIP
content_sections.content:
CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) aligns text and image representations in a shared semantic space. Given a batch of $B$ text-image pairs, the system encodes them into image features $\mathbf{I}_i$ and text features $\mathbf{T}_i$. The objective maximizes cosine similarity along the diagonal (correct pairs) while minimizing similarity for off-diagonal indices (unmatched pairs):

$$\mathcal{L} = -\frac{1}{2B} \sum_{i=1}^B \left[ \ln \frac{\exp(\mathbf{I}_i^{\top} \mathbf{T}_i / \tau)}{\sum_j \exp(\mathbf{I}_i^{\top} \mathbf{T}_j / \tau)} + \ln \frac{\exp(\mathbf{I}_i^{\top} \mathbf{T}_i / \tau)}{\sum_j \exp(\mathbf{I}_j^{\top} \mathbf{T}_i / \tau)} \right]$$

where $\tau$ is a learnable temperature parameter.
